card_description: Tanya Lee is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Context: "Dick argues that an existential act of "disobedience" toward the Artifact (BIP) is the necessary prerequisite for liberation and the perception of the "Palm Tree Garden" (PTG)."
